description: PR7 — async happy path. Small scenario used by commit-3 runner tests: submit a job, poll through queued→running→succeeded, assert result_json byte-equals the sync-path payload for the same scenario.

expected.sync_vs_async_payload: byte-equal after strip_pr7_fields_for_parity on both sides

notes: Trivial scenario — greedy alone places everything. Sufficient for proving the runner path without triggering SA / CP-SAT / chain / rooming_repair.
Commit 1 expects the importer tripwire to fail (planner_job_runner missing); commit 3 turns this suite green.
